allow: Bash(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Path "c:\\Users\\vitto\\Área de Trabalho\\Arquitetura - Trabalho WMS" -Filter "*.md" -Exclude node_modules)

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.Name; Path=$p.Path; Started=$p.StartTime } } | Format-List } else { 'Nada escutando na porta 3333' })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 3992 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { 'Porta 3333 AINDA ocupada por PID ' + \($still.OwningProcess -join ','\) } else { 'Porta 3333 liberada' })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { 'AINDA escutando: PID ' + \($still.OwningProcess -join ','\) } else { 'Servidor encerrado — porta 3333 livre' })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); $ready = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline -and -not $ready\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3333/status -TimeoutSec 1; $ready = $true } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; if \($ready\) { "OK"; $r | ConvertTo-Json } else { "FAILED"; Get-Content server.out.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content server.err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
